meaning: n.领事,(古罗马的)两执政官之一,[史](1799年至1804年间,法兰西共和国的)三执政官之一
examples: He'll hold the post of consul general for the United States in Shanghai.
He'll hold the post of consul general for the United States at Shanghai.
Ms. Silvy Gayatri is Consul General of Indonesia in Guangzhou.
The ceremonial first pitch was thrown by Yoichi Suzuki , consul general of Japan in Boston.
In 1970, the Japanese Consul-General in Sao Paulo, Nobuo Okuchi, was kidnapped by Brazilian revolutionaries.
